title: frankenia pauciflora var. serpyllifolia
intro: Frankenia pauciflora var. serpyllifolia, also known as the coastal or bushy frankenia, is a low-growing, spreading shrub native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, due to the presence of sesquiterpenes and other compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and soothe skin irritations, making it a potential treatment for various skin conditions. Frankenia pauciflora var. serpyllifolia can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
